elements.original_description: A hand holding a credit card, angled diagonally against a pure white background. The card has a metallic sheen with faint holographic details.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a hand holding a credit card, angled diagonally against a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, the credit card has a detailed metallic sheen with faint holographic details, crisp edges, isolated on a stark white background, emotionally neutral.
